name: Ministral 3 (3B / 8B / 14B)
tagline: Three dense edge models with base/instruct/reasoning + vision variants, Apache 2.
metaDescription: Ministral 3 (3B / 8B / 14B) (Mistral AI), released 2025-12-02 — part of the Ministral line. Three dense edge models with base/instruct/reasoning + vision varia…
overview: Ministral 3 (3B / 8B / 14B) is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Ministral line. Released 2025-12-02. Tiny dense edge models for on-device, laptop and drone deployment.
What's notable in this version: Three dense edge models with base/instruct/reasoning + vision variants, Apache 2.0 (ministral-3b/8b/14b-2512).
